name: Orange Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the pot for 15 minutes.
2. Wash the chicken inside and out with cold running water.
3. Rub the inside of the chicken with salt, pepper, and crushed garlic.
4. Stuff the chicken with orange slices.
5. Place the chicken in the pot, breast side down.
6. Sprinkle grated orange rind over the chicken.
7. Add orange juice, soy sauce, ginger root, allspice, and brown sugar to the pot.
8. Cover the pot and place it in a cold oven.
9. Set the temperature to 480°F (250°C).
10. Cook for 90 minutes.
11. Remove from the oven and pour the liquid into a saucepan.
12. Flip the chicken breast side up.
13. Return the uncovered pot to the oven for an additional 10 minutes to brown the chicken.
14. Meanwhile, bring the sauce to a boil and thicken it with arrowroot mixed with stock.
15. Taste the sauce and add additional brown sugar if desired.
